subject: meeting been rescheduled between the governor and skilling yet?

emails.subject: Re: Meeting been rescheduled between the governor and Skilling yet?
emails.subject_base: Meeting been rescheduled between the governor and Skilling yet?
emails.body: Re: Meeting been rescheduled between the governor and Skilling yet? I checked with Skilling's office and there is nothing scheduled. The Gov.'s office bascially said "don't call us, we'll call you". Maureen

emails.subject: Re: Meeting been rescheduled between the governor and Skilling yet?

emails.body: Thank you. Looks like the gov's office would benefit from charm school. Maureen McVicker 10/13/2000 02:34 PM
